videos.headline: Joe Milton slings TD pass to Ramel Keyton for Tennessee
videos.description: Tennessee QB Joe Milton lasers a pass to Ramel Keyton in the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Joe Milton slings TD pass to Ramel Keyton for Tennessee) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Austin Peay QB goes 45 yards on a 4th-down play
videos.description: Austin Peay decides to go for it on 4th-and-2, and QB Mike DiLiello rushes 45 yards for a first down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Austin Peay QB goes 45 yards on a 4th-down play) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Muffed punt sets Tennessee up in the red zone
videos.description: Austin Peay muffs the punt and Tennessee recovers, setting them up in the red zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Muffed punt sets Tennessee up in the red zone) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jabari Small breaks free for a big Tennessee run
videos.description: Tennessee RB Jabari Small gets the handoff and speeds 38 yards down the field in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jabari Small breaks free for a big Tennessee run) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Joe Milton keeps it himself for a Tennessee TD
videos.description: Tennessee QB Joe Milton calls his own number and finds the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Joe Milton keeps it himself for a Tennessee TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Things get chippy between Austin Peay and Tennessee
videos.description: During a Tennessee punt, Ramel Keyton gets tangled up with Austin Peay's Ellis Ellis Jr. as teammates and coaches swarm in to separate them.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Things get chippy between Austin Peay and Tennessee) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kamal Hadden comes away with a Tennessee INT
videos.description: Austin Peay QB Mike DiLiello lobs the ball downfield and is intercepted by Tennessee DB Kamal Hadden.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kamal Hadden comes away with a Tennessee INT) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mike DiLiello tosses 52-yard TD for Austin Peay
videos.description: Austin Peay QB Mike DiLiello finds a wide-open Trey Goodman for a 52-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mike DiLiello tosses 52-yard TD for Austin Peay) 2023/09/09 ESHEET
